## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (`lint`, `typecheck`, `test`, `build`)
- [ ] If new env vars: `.env.example` updated
- [ ] If schema changes: migration generated and committed
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `README.md`) if user-visible
- [ ] No secrets in commits (gitleaks ran locally)
